if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND f.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND f.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND f.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND f.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmBlogFile :: selectById */ f.* , blt.blog_title AS blog_nm FROM cm_blog_file f LEFT JOIN cm_blog blt ON blt.blog_id = f.blog_id WHERE f.blog_img_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmBlogFile :: selectList */ f.* , blt.blog_title AS blog_nm FROM cm_blog_file f LEFT JOIN cm_blog blt ON blt.blog_id = f.blog_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmBlogFile :: selectPageList */ f.* , blt.blog_title AS blog_nm FROM cm_blog_file f LEFT JOIN cm_blog blt ON blt.blog_id = f.blog_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(f.*) /* base.ec.cm :: CmBlogFile :: selectPageCount */ FROM cm_blog_file f
